inputs.multiline_text:

Medium shot from the chest up, sharp side profile looking to the right, high-contrast lighting, clean silhouette, positioned against a solid white wall.
Waist-up portrait at a 45-degree angle, eyes tracking the camera, natural lighting, set against a plain white wall.

High-angle medium shot looking down at the head and torso, soft overhead lighting, clear view of the crown and shoulders, set against a white wall.
Close-up from the collarbone up with eyes closed, peaceful expression, detailed eyelashes, soft diffused light, positioned against a solid white wall.
Waist-up frontal shot standing in a relaxed neutral pose, facing forward, flat lighting to show outfit textures and body build, set against a plain white wall.
Waist-up view from behind, showing hair length and the back of the outfit, shoulders slightly turned, standing directly against a solid white wall.
Waist-up side-profile shot standing straight, showing torso depth and posture, positioned against a clean white wall.
Medium shot from the waist up, arms folded, capturing natural clothing folds and torso silhouette against a solid white wall.
Sitting on a stool, waist-up view, hands resting on a lap (out of frame), three-quarter body angle, positioned against a plain white wall.
Medium shot from the chest up, leaning slightly forward toward the lens, showing compressed proportions and facial detail, set against a solid white wall.
Standard medium shot from the waist up, arms at sides, clear view of torso and clothing details, positioned against a clean white wall.
Cinematic over-the-shoulder medium shot, focus on the face as it turns back toward the camera, set against a solid white wall.
Leaning against a solid white wall, waist-up view, one shoulder forward, relaxed expression, minimalist composition.
Centered waist-up shot, capturing the head and torso silhouette with high clarity against an expansive white wall.
Waist-up shot in bright midday lighting, sharp shadows on the face and torso to test model depth, positioned against a solid white wall.
Waist-up shot in warm, directional golden hour lighting, highlighting hair edges and skin glow, set against a plain white wall.
A tilted Dutch angle medium shot from the chest up, stylized perspective, adding dynamic aesthetic variety to the character's upper body, positioned against a solid white wall.

woman, female, breasts, cleavage, bikini, dress, skirt, makeup glamour, mature adult man, heavy beard, bodybuilder, wax skin, airbrushed, Uber Eats, DoorDash, Glovo, Wolt, readable logo, watermark text, deformed hands, extra fingers
